observations: Toolbar shows a button with accessible name 'Group by Status' whose visible text is 'Group: Status'
Initial column headings at level=3 are 'To Do' (count 1), 'In Progress' (count 0), 'Done' (count 0)
AUT-1 card sits in the 'To Do' column; card action button aria-name is 'Card actions on Task AUT-1 of the To Do column'
Card's priority chip exposes aria-label 'Priority: High' (NOT Medium as the claim asserted)
Clicking 'Group by Status' opens a radiogroup with accessible name 'Group by field' containing radios named Assignee, Category, Priority, Status (Status initially checked)
After clicking the 'Priority' radio, page.url() becomes 'https://fleet-team-y0ak1u2s.atlassian.net/jira/core/projects/AUT/board?filter=&groupBy=priority'
After mutation the toolbar button's accessible name becomes 'Group by Priority' with visible text 'Group: Priority'
After mutation the column headings at level=3 are exactly ['Highest','High','Medium','Low','Lowest'] in that left-to-right order
AUT-1 appears under the 'High' column (High count=1, others 0) — contradicts the claim that it would appear under Medium
AUT-1 card action button aria-name becomes 'Card actions on Task AUT-1 of the High column' (claim said 'of the Medium column')
After mutation a new button with accessible name 'Save or reset view settings' appears in the toolbar, positioned between 'View settings' and 'More actions'
Opening Group by again and clicking radio 'Status' reverts page.url() to '...?filter=&groupBy=status'

After revert, toolbar button is again 'Group by Status', columns are again ['To Do','In Progress','Done'], AUT-1 is back in 'To Do', and the 'Save or reset view settings' button is no longer present in the DOM

locators.purpose: Priority option inside Group by menu
Status option inside Group by menu (to revert)
AUT-1 card-actions button while grouped by Status
locators.preferred: getByRole('button', { name: 'Card actions on Task AUT-1 of the To Do column' })
locators.fallback: locator('button[aria-label="Card actions on Task AUT-1 of the To Do column"]')

locators.purpose: AUT-1 card-actions button while grouped by Priority (observed column = High, not Medium)
locators.preferred: getByRole('button', { name: 'Card actions on Task AUT-1 of the High column' })
locators.fallback: locator('button[aria-label="Card actions on Task AUT-1 of the High column"]')

locators.purpose: Save or reset view settings button (only present after non-default grouping)
locators.preferred: getByRole('button', { name: 'Save or reset view settings' })

locators.purpose: More actions toolbar button (for relative positioning assertions)

verify_post: await expect(page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Card actions on Task AUT-1 of the High column' })).toBeVisible()
await expect(page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Save or reset view settings' })).toBeVisible()
verify_revert: await expect(page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Card actions on Task AUT-1 of the To Do column' })).toBeVisible()
await expect(page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Save or reset view settings' })).toHaveCount(0)

notes: PARTIAL because one sub-claim is incorrect for this fixture: AUT-1's priority is 'High', not 'Medium'. Consequently, when grouped by Priority, AUT-1 appears under the 'High' column and the card-actions aria-label is 'Card actions on Task AUT-1 of the High column' (NOT 'Medium column' as the check specified). All other claims verified: toolbar button rename, URL groupBy query change, the exact ordered column headings ['Highest','High','Medium','Low','Lowest'], appearance of the 'Save or reset view settings' button (positioned between 'View settings' and 'More actions'), and full revert on selecting 'Status'. The Group by menu uses radios inside a radiogroup named 'Group by field'; the selected radio has aria-checked='true' and its visible text appends ' Selected' via an inner img.
